EKS Cluster | Kubernetes 1.32 | Private API Endpoint | Cilium CNI (eBPF) | Karpenter node autoscaling

Node Group t3.medium | Karpenter (on-demand + spot) | IRSA enabled | PSS restricted enforced | Cilium eBPF
EKS private endpoint • VPC Flow Logs
Shared Infrastructure (VPC endpoints for S3 + ECR — no internet egress for artifact traffic)
deploy freq · lead time · CFR · MTTR
